title: senecio neowebsteri
intro: Senecio neowebsteri, also known as the New Webbs' Ragwort, is a plant species in the sunflower family that is native to the southwestern United States. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it a potential treatment for wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Senecio neowebsteri include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, although it is essential to note that proper identification and usage are crucial due to potential toxicity.
